summary: RBAC and SSO features testing completed. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and flows working correctly. SSO IdP is MOCKED/SIMULATED - the callback endpoint simulates IdP response for testing purposes.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Good: RBAC auto-creates 3 system default roles (Organization Admin, Editor, Viewer) on first access per organization
Good: System roles cannot be deleted but can be edited for permissions
Good: Custom roles can be created with granular permissions from 7 categories (Documents, Vault, Members, Templates, Approvals, Notarization, Organization)
Good: SSO uses in-memory session storage for mock implementation - suitable for testing
Good: SSO callback supports JIT (Just-In-Time) user provisioning when user doesn't exist
Good: SSO domain validation correctly rejects emails from non-allowed domains
Good: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Minor: React hydration warning in MemberRow component for option/select rendering - cosmetic only

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load, tabs work, modals functional

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed roles during testing (automatically cleaned up). JIT provisioned test users via SSO callback.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC and SSO fully working. RBAC: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/permissions returns 23 permissions in 7 categories. GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/roles auto-creates 3 system roles on first access. Custom roles CRUD all working. Role assignment to members via PUT/DELETE /api/organizations/{org_id}/members/{member_id}/custom-role working. SSO: POST /api/sso/discover checks domain, POST /api/sso/initiate starts flow with session_id, GET /api/sso/session/{id} returns pending status, POST /api/sso/callback completes auth with JIT provisioning. Frontend: Login page has 'Sign in with Enterprise SSO' link, /sso/login page with email discovery flow, Organizations page has Roles and SSO tabs. Role creation modal shows all 7 permission categories.

rbac.GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/roles: Auto-creates 3 system roles (Organization Admin, Editor, Viewer) - PASS
rbac.POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/roles: Creates custom role with selected permissions - PASS
rbac.PUT /api/organizations/{org_id}/roles/{r: Updates role name, description, permissions - PASS
rbac.PUT /api/organizations/{org_id}/members/: Assigns custom role to member - PASS

sso.POST /api/sso/discover (configured domai: Finds orgs with matching SSO domain - PASS
sso.GET /api/sso/session/{session_id}: Returns session details with status=pending - PASS

frontend.Login page SSO link: Button 'Sign in with Enterprise SSO' visible and navigates to /sso/login - PASS
frontend.SSO Login page: Email input, Continue with SSO button, back link - all working - PASS
frontend.Organizations Roles tab: Shows system roles with SYSTEM badge, permission count, New Role button - PASS
frontend.Organizations SSO tab: SSO toggle, provider select, config fields - PASS
frontend.Role creation modal: Name, description inputs, 7 permission categories with checkboxes - PASS
frontend.Members custom role assignment: Dropdown for custom role per member - PASS

mocked_apis.SSO Identity Provider: MOCKED/SIMULATED - /api/sso/callback acts as the IdP response handler. No real SAML/OIDC IdP integration. Uses in-memory session storage.
